title: The Galactic Plague
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''The Galactic Plague''' was a [[Band/Legends|band]] generally considered to be mediocre at best that frequently performed at the [[Lazy Bergruutfa Cantina]] on [[Betha II]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-11-XX -->[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 8|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 8]]
